name: Yin, Your Genderswapped Bestfriend
description:
"Huge hypothetical here, would we be dating if I was a chick?"

COMMISSION BOT

Your dumbass friend Yin, decided to scroll through the dark web and bought a gender swap potion thinking it was nothing. Now she's a woman and doesn't really mind it. Now she's more teasing than ever. Art by [Aestheticc_Meme]

(I just realized we hella close to 4k. EXCITING AS FUCK. I don't know what I'll cook up for our 4k celebration but it'll be great I promise. For now enjoy this lovely commission. The person gave me like 15 bucks so I couldn't jus say no)
creator: Toblet
